steps.title: Substitute the given y-coordinate into both equations
steps.content:
The intersection point is $(q, 17)$, so $y = 17$ satisfies both equations. Substituting:
$$-x - w(17) = -255 \implies x + 17w = 255$$
$$2x - w(17) = 51$$
Now we have a system of two equations in two unknowns ($x$ and $w$).

steps.title: Add the equations to eliminate w
steps.content:
Add the two equations to cancel the $17w$ terms:
$$(x + 17w) + (2x - 17w) = 255 + 51$$
$$3x = 306$$
$$x = 102$$
